sections.title: Testing Locks
sections.content:
This section will be used to display the different locks, what they do, and what they look like on the user's side.
EVERY section, sub-section, and sub-sub-section are able to have different lock settings. 
Just because section 1.0 is fully locked does not mean 1.1 is fully locked. This is done to allow enough flexibility for you (the admin) to create the sow structures and possibilities engineers need while still maintaining the standardized format this project aims to solve.

children.title: Everything Fully Locked
children.content:
All four locks are enabled:
Text
Deletion
Tables
Sections

The ONLY thing an engineer can interact with would be the {{field_blanks_1777933827163}} that you insert.
If NO blanks are added, the engineer will NOT be able to change ANYTHING about this section.

children.title: Text Unlocked
children.content:
When the "Lock Text" is disabled, the engineer can edit this exact text you're reading here. 
This is useful when a section is dependent on the purpose of the sow and there is no standard that EVERY sow would follow. 
For example, the "Background" section may have text unlocked, as no set of blanks could capture all of the information needed for the section.

children.title: Deletion Unlocked
children.content:
When the "Lock Deletion" is disabled, the engineer is able to delete this whole section and all of the following sub-sections. 
In the engineer's view, they will be asked "Do you need this section?" for any section that is deletable.

A section where Deletion is unlocked would be like a manufacturing limits/requirements. 
For example, a sow that dictates certain measurements or materials to be used for parts would need that section, while a sow that is requesting deliverance of an already manufactured product would not need that section. 
In the latter scenario, the engineer would select "no, I do not need this section", and all of the sub-sections would be removed from their sow, and the blanks associated will not need to be answered.

children.title: Table Addition Unlocked
children.content:
When the "Lock Tables" is disabled, the engineer is able to add tables to this section.
This may be useful to make charts, describe deliverable's timelines, or other things that rows and columns help to represent.

children.title: Section Addition Unlocked
children.content:
When the "Lock Sections" is disabled, the engineer is able to add sub-sections to this section. Each sub-section has every lock disabled, as the user would need to modify the text, perhaps add tables, perhaps add more sections, and definitely delete the section if it turns out to not be needed.
This may be utilized on a specific sub-section where the engineer should construct the entailed contents of a section. For example, this may be used for...
